examples: A large detachment of police was used to segregate the two rival camps of protesters.
HTML head and body tags segregate your document into sections.
Oils segregate out of water because the oil-oil interaction is more favorable than the oil-water interaction.
Trains should have a separate carriage for smokers, and restaurants should segregate as well.
Segregate email to early and late times in the day so you can work in the middle.
